special_mechanics.name: Head Smash Attack
special_mechanics.description: Bonk uses his head to smash enemies

special_mechanics.name: Propeller Flight
special_mechanics.description: Propeller seeds allow Bonk to fly

special_mechanics.name: Form Changes
special_mechanics.description: Power-ups change Bonk into creatures (Bonk Crab with shooting ability, Big Kronk dinosaur form)

special_mechanics.name: Size Modification
special_mechanics.description: Candies change Bonk's size from tiny to huge

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but contains no quantitative physics data. Movement parameters completely undocumented. Reviews mention 'easy controls' and describe gameplay but offer no technical specifications.
